description.en: Complete guide to payment terms for international fastener trade. Learn about Letter of Credit, T/T, D/P, D/A and other payment methods for importing fasteners from China.
description.zh: 国际紧固件贸易付款条款完整指南。了解信用证、T/T、D/P、D/A和其他从中国进口紧固件的付款方式。
description.es: Guía completa de términos de pago para comercio internacional de sujetadores. Aprenda sobre Carta de Crédito, T/T, D/P, D/A y otros métodos de pago.
description.ar: دليل شامل لشروط الدفع للتجارة الدولية للمثبتات. تعلم عن خطاب الاعتماد و T/T و D/P و D/A وطرق الدفع الأخرى.
description.fr: Guide complet des conditions de paiement pour le commerce international de fixations. Apprenez la lettre de crédit, T/T, D/P, D/A et autres méthodes.
description.pt: Guia completo de termos de pagamento para comércio internacional de fixadores. Aprenda sobre Carta de Crédito, T/T, D/P, D/A e outros métodos.
description.ru: Полное руководство по условиям оплаты для международной торговли крепежом. Узнайте о аккредитиве, T/T, D/P, D/A и других методах.
description.ja: 国際ファスナー貿易の支払条件の完全ガイド。信用状、T/T、D/P、D/Aなどの支払方法について学びます。
description.de: Vollständiger Leitfaden zu Zahlungsbedingungen für internationalen Fastener Handel. Lernen Sie Letter of Credit, T/T, D/P, D/A.
description.hi: अंतरराष्ट्रीय फास्टनर व्यापार के लिए भुगतान शर्तों की पूर्ण गाइड। लेटर ऑफ क्रेडिट, T/T, D/P, D/A और अन्य भुगतान विधियों के बारे में जानें।

keywords: payment terms, Letter of Credit, T/T, D/P, international trade, fastener import payment

body.en:
Common payment methods for fastener imports from China:

1. T/T (Telegraphic Transfer):
- Buyer transfers money directly to seller's bank
- Most common for established relationships
- Terms: 30% deposit, 70% before shipment
- Pros: Simple, low cost
- Cons: No payment protection

2. L/C (Letter of Credit):
- Bank guarantees payment upon presentation of documents
- Pros: Maximum protection for both parties
- Cons: Expensive, complex

3. D/P (Documents Against Payment):
- Documents released upon payment at destination
- Pros: Some protection for seller
- Cons: Buyer must pay before receiving goods

4. D/A (Documents Against Acceptance):
- Documents released against acceptance of draft
- Pros: Allows buyer time to sell goods before paying
- Cons: Higher risk for seller

Payment terms recommendations by relationship level:

New Suppliers:
- 100% T/T before shipment
- Or 30% deposit, 70% against copy of B/L

Established Relationship (6+ months):
- 30% deposit, 70% T/T against B/L copy
- Or 30% deposit, 70% D/P at sight

Long-term Partners (1+ year):
- 30% deposit, 70% T/T 7-15 days after shipment
- Consider open account terms for trusted suppliers

Large Orders ($50,000+):
- 20% deposit, 80% in two installments
- Consider Letter of Credit for protection

Protecting yourself in international fastener trade:

1. Verify Supplier:
- Business license verification
- Factory audit before first order
- Reference checks from other buyers

2. Use Secure Payment Channels:
- Use bank-to-bank transfers
- Avoid Western Union or similar
- Keep payment records

3. Document Everything:
- Clear contract with specifications
- Inspections before payment
- Quality agreements in writing

4. Start Small:
- Test order before large commitment
- Build trust gradually
- Increase terms as relationship develops
